series_metadata.series_title: Files of Cases Closed Without Formal Action
series_metadata.series_description: Confidential Investigative Files from Complaints Closed Without a Formal Action of the Board.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Five years after case closure if file is not re-opened within that time frame secondary to a new complaint, except in the event of death of licensee prior to 5 years, then file may be destroyed upon death of licensee., Paper: Shred
